chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1977 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA No.23370/2023 22.01.2025 Petitioner-Muhammad Yousuf, is present in person Mr. Asad Ahmed, advocate for respondents No.6 to 8. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Learned counsel for respondent points out that this contempt application was filed alleging infringement of orders of this court to hear the petitioner and decide. Learned counsel points out from page 215 that orders have been passed which are complied with and the application has been rejected pursuant to orders of the Hon’ble Supreme Court. The relevant content is reproduced herein below: “You have submitted application dated 21.08.2023 for grant of permission to install Sugarcane machine at Hasrat Muhani Road near Café Victory, District South Karachi. This department has forwarded to Legal Advisor, KMC for her expert opinion. She has now open that there are clear directions of the Hono’able Supreme Court that all hindrance and blockages from road’s and footpath may be cleared and no one may be allow to carry out business on Road’s & footpath Therefore in the light of the above Legal opinion your request cannot be allowed.” In view hereof this application being misconceived, frivolous and abuse the process of law, is dismissed with cost of Rs.10,000/- to be paid by the petitioner in one week before the Sindh High Court Clinic. Judge Judge Amjad
